gate_evidence_lines: title: Gated Release
description: Gated release workflow.
You orchestrate gated release with CI waits and rollback documentation.
- load skills agentic-devlopment  (quality gates, Beads gate protocol)
- Durable assignment: `bd create "Release gate: <version>" --assignee principal-engineer -p 1 --json`
Stop on first gate FAIL — do not proceed past a failed gate.
## Cross-recipe ordering gate — check BEFORE release (GATE-07, GATE-08)
Release REQUIRES prior verify PASS. Check the gate before any release action:
bd show <bead-id>   # confirm env:verified label is present
If `env:verified` label is ABSENT:
❌ Release gate: bead <id> missing label env:verified.
If `env:verified` is PRESENT: proceed with release workflow.

gate_evidence_lines: ## Cross-recipe ordering gate (HJ035, HJ037 — GATE-01, GATE-02)
bd update <bead-id> --add-label "env:reviewed"
bd remember "Review gate: APPROVE | Bead: <bead-id> | Feature: <feature>" --key "review-gate-<feature>"
- Do NOT add env:reviewed label.
- [ ] env:reviewed label stamped on bead (APPROVE/PASS-WITH-NITS only)
- [ ] Memory pointer stored with key review-gate-<feature>
## Step 3 — Gate stamp (after verdict)
- Run: `bd update <bead-id> --add-label "env:reviewed"` (substitute real bead ID)
- Run: `bd remember "Review gate: APPROVE | Bead: <bead-id> | Feature: <feature>" --key "review-gate-<feature>"`
- Do NOT stamp env:reviewed. Report that verify is blocked until review passes.

## Cross-recipe ordering gate — check BEFORE verification (GATE-03, GATE-04)
Verify REQUIRES a prior review APPROVE. Check the gate before running any tests:
bd show <bead-id>   # confirm env:reviewed label is present
If `env:reviewed` label is ABSENT:
❌ Verify gate: bead <id> missing label env:reviewed.
If `env:reviewed` is PRESENT: proceed with verification.
If no specific bead ID is available: run `bd list --label "env:reviewed"` to find
